description_long: This elderly person is depicted with a hunched posture, wearing a black beanie hat and large, round sunglasses that obscure much of the face. The individual is dressed in a short-sleeved, camouflage-patterned shirt and brown pants that are visibly patched in several places, suggesting wear and age. Black gloves cover both hands, and the shoes are simple and black, matching the gloves and hat. The figure's skin is pale, and the arms are thin, contributing to an overall frail appearance. The face is partially shadowed by the hat and glasses, but the nose and mouth are visible, with pronounced cheekbones. The overall look suggests a cautious or sneaky demeanor, possibly intended for a scenario involving stealth or urban exploration.
description: A hunched elderly person wearing a black beanie, sunglasses, camouflage shirt, patched brown pants, and black gloves and shoes. The figure appears frail and cautious, with a distinctive urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hunched posture, black beanie, sunglasses, camouflage shirt, and both gloved hands extended forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the pronounced hunch, profile of the face with sunglasses, and the patchwork on the brown pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the beanie, full camouflage shirt, and the patches on the back of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the hunched posture, side profile of the face, and the patched pants.
attribute_clothing_style: Casual urban attire with a camouflage short-sleeved shirt, patched brown pants, black beanie, black gloves, and black shoes.
attribute_posture: Hunched forward, arms extended slightly outward.
attribute_hairstyle: Hair is fully covered by a black beanie; no visible hair.
attribute_facial_features: Large round sunglasses, pronounced cheekbones, visible nose and mouth, no visible facial hair.
